failures.description: The Executor incorrectly concluded that no items matched even though ProductCatalogSearch returned one valid matching item priced at $46.13, which is greater than $45.76.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available beginner Jigsaw Puzzles costing more than $45.76. The tool output at index 3 clearly returned one matching item: item_id 1096508426, available=true, difficulty level=beginner, price=46.13. At index 4, the Executor had this relevant tool output but synthesized the opposite answer, saying no items matched. This is a direct contradiction of the tool result, so the failure is a misinterpretation of tool output rather than an invalid tool call or underspecified intent.
